payload.answer: I’m seeing an ambiguous note mentioning “Sam,” but I can’t reliably determine which Sam or what specific action is intended. Can you clarify: (1) which Sam (e.g., full name or role), and (2) what the note is asking for or reporting?

entity_resolution.reason: Model confidence is low for an ambiguous note about 'Sam'. Cloud escalation is disabled, so clarification is required before storing anything durable.

details: No durable memory committed due to low confidence and cloud escalation disabled.

repair_options: Provide Sam’s full name and role/team
Paste the exact Slack message text (or link) containing the note
State the intended outcome/action (e.g., escalate, follow up, task assignment)
